promptContracts.rtkEfficiency: RTK: prefer bounded RTK forms when available; otherwise use bounded shell output.
promptContracts.repoInspection: Inspect narrowly with rg/fd or tracked-file tools before broad reads.
promptContracts.contextDiscipline: Name the task area and owning surface before exploring unrelated code.
promptContracts.responseBoundaries: Answer the requested artifact or direct finding; omit unsolicited workflow advice.
promptContracts.scopeDiscipline: Derive the edit envelope from the user request and controlling source; removed concepts become absence.
promptContracts.sourceBackedBehavior: Source-backed behaviour is mandatory. Behavior claims need current source, provider docs/source, fixtures, tests, exact user-provided evidence, and a Source Evidence Map.
promptContracts.correctionDiscipline: Verify corrections before applying them; block on missing or contradictory source truth.
promptContracts.delegationDiscipline: Split broad work only when ownership or evidence paths are independent; parent owns merge decisions.
promptContracts.continuityDiscipline: For long work, keep a short continuation record with objective, done, next, and blockers.
promptContracts.accountabilityPressure: The route path is inspect, prove, change, validate, report. A precise STATUS BLOCKED with Attempted/Evidence/Need is valid when evidence or permission is missing.
promptContracts.simplicityDiscipline: Simplicity discipline: Prefer direct source-backed code over abstractions; move evolving workflows into skills, hooks, or commands.
